title: Comparison of amyloid PET acquired through standardized and unstandardized protocols
authors: K. Cody; Andrzej Sokołowski; Lucah Medina Guerra; P. Insel; W. Jagust; Theresa M. Harrison; E. Mormino
abstract: Amyloid positron emission tomography (PET) scans collected by Alzheimer's Disease Research Centers (ADRCs) include site‐specific “mixed protocols” and, since 2021, standardized protocols through the Standardized, Centralized AD/ADRD Neuroimaging initiative. We compared amyloid PET from cohorts using unstandardized versus standardized pre‐processing protocols.
